From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1965 Italian musicarello film

| Questo pazzo, pazzo mondo della canzone | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| Directed by | [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci") [Giovanni Grimaldi](/wiki/Giovanni_Grimaldi "Giovanni Grimaldi") |
| Written by | Bruno Corbucci Giovanni Grimaldi |
| Starring | * [Alberto Bonucci](/wiki/Alberto_Bonucci "Alberto Bonucci") * [Aroldo Tieri](/wiki/Aroldo_Tieri "Aroldo Tieri") * [Vittorio Congia](/wiki/Vittorio_Congia "Vittorio Congia") * [Umberto D'Orsi](/wiki/Umberto_D%27Orsi "Umberto D'Orsi") * [Sandra Mondaini](/wiki/Sandra_Mondaini "Sandra Mondaini") * [Valeria Fabrizi](/wiki/Valeria_Fabrizi "Valeria Fabrizi") * [Margaret Lee](/wiki/Margaret_Lee_(English_actress) "Margaret Lee (English actress)") * [Halina Zalewska](/wiki/Halina_Zalewska "Halina Zalewska") * I Pellerani |
| Cinematography | Luciano Trasatti |
| Distributed by | [Variety Distribution](/wiki/Variety_Distribution "Variety Distribution") |
| Release date | * 1965 (1965) |
| Running time | 103 minutes |
| Country | Italy |
| Language | [Italian](/wiki/Italian_language "Italian language") |

***Questo pazzo, pazzo mondo della canzone*** is a 1965 [Italian](/wiki/Italy "Italy") *[musicarello](/wiki/Musicarello "Musicarello")* film written and directed by [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci") and [Giovanni Grimaldi](/wiki/Giovanni_Grimaldi "Giovanni Grimaldi").
